_meta.criteria: CONSERVATIVE (owner decision 2026-07-21): cut only products that are confirmed discontinued or effectively unbuyable at retail. Every status below was verified by web research on 2026-07-21, not assumed.
_meta.scope: All 748 catalog rows scanned; 17 products investigated; 14 confirmed dead (16 rows), 2 borderline (4 rows, default keep), 1 corrupt row.
rules_for_execution: REVIEW ARTIFACT ONLY. Nothing in /fragrances changes until Joseph approves line items.

Replacements are same-slot (same gender/vibe/tier pool) and were pre-checked against brand caps (max 3/brand/vibe) and in-pool duplicates; the execution script must re-validate both plus max-1-LV and Byredo/Diptyque-unisex-only.
Replacements enter with the FULL target record per CATALOG.md Stage E: real pyramid, description, data_status drafted-or-verified. No legacy-shaped rows.
Cut rows may be referenced by Supabase wishlists/collections. Execution must count affected references first (SELECT count by fragrance_id) and Joseph decides: silent removal vs migration.
New rows get NEW ids (never reuse a cut id).

cuts.name: Chance Eau de Cologne pour Homme
cuts.reason: Product does not exist. Chanel's Chance line is women-only per Chanel's own catalog; row is a PDF-extraction artifact.

replacement_proposal.name: Allure Homme Sport Cologne
replacement_proposal.rationale: RENAME rather than replace: the row's accords (Citrus/Fresh/Aromatic) and Cologne concentration match this real Chanel men's cologne exactly, and renaming keeps the Chanel count in male_daily unchanged (already 5, over cap; adding a different brand would not fix that pre-existing violation either).

replacement_proposal.name: L'Homme
replacement_proposal.rationale: Current, popular, formal-appropriate. Dior is at 4 in male_formal (over cap) so the replacement deliberately reduces Dior.

replacement_proposal.name: Dylan Blue
replacement_proposal.rationale: Current, hugely popular, heavily discounted (budget band), casual-friendly. Versace count in male_chill is 1.

replacement_proposal.name: L.12.12 Bleu
replacement_proposal.rationale: Current, budget, chill-coded. Keeps Davidoff at 1 in the pool (Champion) instead of 2.

replacement_proposal.name: Cool Water Intense
replacement_proposal.rationale: Current (2019), budget, sport-adjacent, widely stocked. Davidoff in male_sport goes 1 -> 2, under cap.

cuts.name: CK2
cuts.reason: Discontinued, confirmed by CK rep per Basenotes; secondary market only, counterfeits common.

replacement_proposal.name: CK Everyone
replacement_proposal.rationale: The direct modern successor: current, unisex, cheap, popular. Cutting CK2 takes CK to 2 in the pool, so this stays at the 3 cap.

cuts.name: Wonderstruck
cuts.reason: Discontinued; resale at $75-350. Users cannot buy it at retail at all.

replacement_proposal.name: Thank U Next
replacement_proposal.rationale: Current celebrity bestseller in the same budget-daily lane. Execution must confirm it is not already in this pool (it exists elsewhere in the catalog).

cuts.name: Escada Island Kiss
cuts.reason: Discontinued limited edition; Escada's summer LEs are dead by design.

replacement_proposal.name: Tommy Girl
replacement_proposal.rationale: Current, fresh, budget, sport-friendly. Not currently in female_sport.

cuts.name: Escada Sorbetto Rosso
cuts.reason: 2018 limited edition, out of stock across retailers.

replacement_proposal.name: Happy Heart
replacement_proposal.rationale: Current, fresh-floral, budget. Clinique in female_sport goes 1 -> 2, under cap.

cuts.name: Victoria's Secret Bombshell Summer
cuts.reason: Discontinued limited edition, secondary market only.

replacement_proposal.name: Bombshell
replacement_proposal.rationale: The core Bombshell is a current bestseller; users searching for the Summer LE almost certainly want this. Same brand slot. Execution must verify the exact row id in female_sport.

cuts.name: Forbidden Rose
cuts.reason: Entire Avril Lavigne fragrance line discontinued; resale only.

replacement_proposal.name: Eilish
replacement_proposal.rationale: Current, popular celebrity gourmand (vanilla/amber) that fits the chill lane the cut row occupied. Note the cut row's id is itself mangled (lavigne...edp-avril), more PDF corruption.

cuts.name: Incandessence
cuts.reason: Discontinued years ago; Avon is direct-sales even when alive, so retail buyability was already near zero.

replacement_proposal.name: Cloud Pink
replacement_proposal.rationale: Current (2023), budget, soft-gourmand chill profile. Distinct product from Cloud; Ariana Grande in female_chill goes 1 -> 2.

replacement_proposal.name: Legend
replacement_proposal.rationale: The brand's current flagship: popular, budget, formal-appropriate. Same brand slot, count unchanged.

cuts.name: Dunhill Icon
cuts.reason: Inter Parfums' Dunhill license expired Sep 2023 and was not renewed; entire fragrance line dead. Icon stock is thin and rising in price.

replacement_proposal.name: Luna Rossa Ocean
replacement_proposal.rationale: Current, popular, daily-wear. Prada not at cap in male_daily. (Budget band via heavy discounting, same as other entries in this pool.)

cuts.name: Dunhill Century
cuts.reason: Same expired license; no longer produced.

replacement_proposal.name: 212 VIP Black
replacement_proposal.rationale: Current, popular, evening/formal-coded, heavily discounted. Carolina Herrera not at cap in male_formal.

borderline_default_keep.name: Nautica Classic
borderline_default_keep.reason: Officially discontinued per community consensus, but FragranceNet and other discounters still stock it deeply with reviews into 2026. Users can still buy it today.
borderline_default_keep.recommendation: Keep for now; recheck stock in the next audit. If cut later: male_chill -> Nautica Voyage (brand count holds), male_formal -> Ralph Lauren Polo Black, unisex_chill -> Davidoff Cool Water Parfum.

borderline_default_keep.name: Dunhill Desire Blue
borderline_default_keep.reason: Same dead license as Icon/Century, but Desire Blue has years of deep discounter stock and remains cheap and easy to buy.
borderline_default_keep.recommendation: Keep for now; recheck in the next audit. If cut later -> Abercrombie & Fitch First Instinct Blue or Nautica Voyage Sport.

watch_list.name: Diesel Loverdose
watch_list.note: Suspected discontinued; not verified this audit. Check next audit before enriching further.
